overview: I rebuilt my Week 1-3 tools as multi-agent systems, discovering that a 3x cost premium ($0.05 vs $0.15/run) is trivial for low-volume use but $365K/year at scale. I added resilience patterns, a token profiler, and cut my ROI Analyzer cost 70% via prompt optimization.

keyPoints.title: Multi-agent Feature Spec costs 3x more: $0.15 vs $0.05
Shared state beats parameter passing for agent coordination
Tools gave correct ROI; guessing gave -98% vs $10K actual
5 failure patterns mapped to 5 resilience strategies
Token profiler cut ROI Analyzer cost 70%: 5 calls to 1
